fix_details: Already fixed 2026-04-30 in decider applied patch 1 of suggested-patches-2026-04-30T17-20.json (paired with ISS-1807 patch 0). The EXP-275 paragraph now contains the parenthetical "(the multi-station INTERMAGNET ensemble cited above — 207 observations across 39 total eclipses, including August 2017 — documents the same ≥3-station coherent Chapman-pattern, satisfying the rule's own multi-station threshold)" which pre-empts the defender retreat about single-station BOU-2017 evidence. Verified 2026-05-11.
summary: Verification for routed-stale ISS-1808 (paired with ISS-1807). Curmudgeon Hole 2 recommendation option (a) landed verbatim as patch 1 in suggested-patches-2026-04-30T17-20.json on 2026-04-30; the parenthetical citing Meza et al. 2021 INTERMAGNET ensemble closes the single-station-vs-≥3-station retreat.
